viral_posts.hook: We were lucky enough to yoink two beautiful Ornate Lobsters from the reef and cook them ov
viral_posts.caption: We were lucky enough to yoink two beautiful Ornate Lobsters from the reef and cook them over the fire on a sand island off the coast of Queensland. Does it get ANY better!?

viral_posts.hook: What a man really needs isn’t distraction it’s reconnection.
viral_posts.caption:
What a man really needs isn’t distraction it’s reconnection.
Reconnect with nature. Train your body hard. Spend time with good friends who bring out the best in you. Eat real food, slow down, heal properly.

Then, when your spirit feels grounded again, go find a woman you can truly build with.

viral_posts.hook: Giant rainbow lobster cooked over a fire on a deserted island 🏝️ These memories are worth
viral_posts.caption:
Giant rainbow lobster cooked over a fire on a deserted island 🏝️ These memories are worth more than anything. 🦞🔥

#lobster #fishing #fishing🐟 #seafood #outdoorcooking
